title: A Very Special Christmas Show
overview: A Very Special Christmas Show is a holiday anthology film that delivers never before seen stories of the season. From distraught elves to snowstorm stranded celebrations, this holiday special gives the Christmas spirit wrapped in a bundle of laughs.
